---
title: "References"
---

## [10 Neural Networks](https://github.com/radekosmulski/10_neural_nets)

## Batch Normalization

- [Batch Normalization: Accelerating Deep Network Training (arXiv 1502.03167)](https://arxiv.org/abs/1502.03167)
- [GoogLeNet / Inception (arXiv 1409.4842)](https://arxiv.org/abs/1409.4842)
- [Network In Network (arXiv 1312.6199)](https://arxiv.org/abs/1312.6199)

## Other Papers

- [Group Normalization (arXiv 1801.06146)](https://arxiv.org/abs/1801.06146)
- [Boltzmann Machines — Hinton (Toronto)](https://www.cs.toronto.edu/%7Ehinton/csc321/readings/boltz321.pdf)

## GANs

- [The GANfather: The Man Who's Given Machines the Gift of Imagination](https://www.technologyreview.com/2018/02/21/145289/the-ganfather-the-man-whos-given-machines-the-gift-of-imagination/)
